## Description
Brief description of the change.

## Provider / area
Which providers or areas are affected? (e.g. aws-lambda, gcp-functions, daemon, CLI, config, docs.)

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Docs updated (README, QUICKSTART, COMMAND_REFERENCE, or provider/setup docs) if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No unrelated formatting or refactor-only changes

## Notes
Any follow-up work or caveats.
